channel.title: FG — Own Your Power
channel.description: Trauma-informed, practical guidance on bullying prevention, cyberbullying, toxic relationships, boundaries, and recovery — from FG, an anti-bullying platform with 40+ tools.
channel.itunes:author: FG — Own Your Power
channel.itunes:summary: Anti-bullying, boundaries, and recovery — trauma-informed and practical.

item.title: Top 10 Trending GitHub Repos This Week | FG Own Your Power
item.description: Top 10 Trending GitHub Repos This Week — Skills are the new apps. This episode breaks down the fastest-growing open-source AI agent repos, why they matter, and how to use them. Source: youtube.com/watch?v=VeNWtD_eN2s
